top3.sql:
SELECT e.colour AS eye_colour, h.colour AS hair_colour, s.colour AS skin_colour
FROM superhero sb
JOIN gender g ON sb.gender_id = g.id
JOIN publisher p ON sb.publisher_id = p.id
JOIN colour e ON sb.eye_colour_id = e.id
JOIN colour h ON sb.hair_colour_id = h.id
JOIN colour s ON sb.skin_colour_id = s.id
WHERE g.gender = 'Female' AND p.publisher_name = 'Dark Horse Comics';

SELECT e.colour AS eye_colour, h.colour AS hair_colour, s.colour AS skin_colour
FROM superhero sb
JOIN gender g ON sb.gender_id = g.id
JOIN publisher p ON sb.publisher_id = p.id
JOIN colour e ON sb.eye_colour_id = e.id
JOIN colour h ON sb.hair_colour_id = h.id
JOIN colour s ON sb.skin_colour_id = s.id
WHERE g.gender = 'Female' AND p.publisher_name = 'Dark Horse Comics';

SELECT 
    c1.colour AS eye_colour, 
    c2.colour AS hair_colour, 
    c3.colour AS skin_colour
FROM superhero sb
INNER JOIN gender g ON sb.gender_id = g.id
INNER JOIN publisher p ON sb.publisher_id = p.id
INNER JOIN colour c1 ON sb.eye_colour_id = c1.id
INNER JOIN colour c2 ON sb.hair_colour_id = c2.id
INNER JOIN colour c3 ON sb.skin_colour_id = c3.id
WHERE g.gender = 'Female' AND p.publisher_name = 'Dark Horse Comics';

final.sql:
SELECT e.colour AS eye_colour, h.colour AS hair_colour, s.colour AS skin_colour
FROM superhero sb
JOIN gender g ON sb.gender_id = g.id
JOIN publisher p ON sb.publisher_id = p.id
JOIN colour e ON sb.eye_colour_id = e.id
JOIN colour h ON sb.hair_colour_id = h.id
JOIN colour s ON sb.skin_colour_id = s.id
WHERE g.gender = 'Female' AND p.publisher_name = 'Dark Horse Comics';
